bluetooth_confirm.title: LightElf Laser
bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name} using Home Assistant Bluetooth.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the laser.

init.title: Upload SVG
init.description: Upload an SVG file to the LightElf Laser SVG library. The file is saved under Home Assistant local media and selected automatically.

error.invalid_svg: The uploaded file was not a valid SVG.

draw_svg.name: Draw SVG
draw_svg.description: Draw an SVG from the laser's SVG drop folder.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id when more than one laser is set up.

file.name: SVG file
file.description: Filename in the SVG drop folder. Defaults to the currently selected SVG.

draw_text.name: Draw text
draw_text.description: Draw vector (Hershey) text on the laser.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id when more than one laser is set up.

text.name: Text
text.description: Message to draw. Defaults to the current Text entity value.

size.name: Size
size.description: Cap height in projector units (auto-scaled to fit).

vertical_position.name: Vertical position
vertical_position.description: Vertical offset over the midline (+ up / - down).

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id when more than one laser is set up.

index.name: Index
index.description: Zero-based shape index within the selected family.

color.name: Color
color.description: Use original to preserve stored colors, or choose a beam color.

play_animation.name: Play animation
play_animation.description: Play a firmware-native animation or effect.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id when more than one laser is set up.

index.name: Index
index.description: One-based animation index within the selected family.

query_device.name: Query device
query_device.description: Return the latest decoded device state.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id when more than one laser is set up.
